research_papers.title: Progressive Knowledge Distillation for Remaining Useful Life Prediction of Turbofan Engines
research_papers.abstract: We propose a novel progressive knowledge distillation framework for RUL prediction that leverages multi-scale temporal convolutional networks. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art compression ratios while maintaining prediction accuracy on the C-MAPSS dataset.

research_papers.title: Lightweight Transformer for Predictive Maintenance in Edge Computing Environments
research_papers.abstract: This paper presents a lightweight transformer architecture designed for predictive maintenance tasks deployed on edge devices. We demonstrate significant model compression through structured pruning and quantization-aware training.

research_papers.title: A Survey on Deep Learning-Based Prognostics and Health Management: Methods, Applications and Challenges
research_papers.abstract: This comprehensive survey reviews recent advances in deep learning methods for prognostics and health management. We cover TCN, LSTM, Transformer-based approaches for RUL estimation and fault diagnosis in industrial systems.

research_papers.title: Temporal Convolutional Networks with Frequency-Domain Features for Industrial Time Series Prediction
research_papers.abstract: We introduce a novel TCN architecture augmented with FFT-based frequency domain features for industrial time series prediction. Experiments on C-MAPSS and other benchmark datasets show consistent improvements.

research_papers.title: Multi-Scale Feature Fusion for Degradation Modeling in Rotating Machinery
research_papers.abstract: A multi-scale feature fusion framework for degradation modeling that combines time-domain and frequency-domain representations for more accurate RUL estimation of rotating machinery components.

research_papers.title: Self-Supervised Pre-training for Condition Monitoring with Limited Labeled Data
research_papers.abstract: We propose a self-supervised pre-training strategy for condition monitoring systems that significantly reduces the need for labeled fault data. The method is validated on bearing fault diagnosis and turbofan engine datasets.

research_papers.title: Knowledge Distillation Meets Edge Deployment: A Practical Guide for Industrial AI
research_papers.abstract: This paper provides practical guidance on applying knowledge distillation techniques for deploying deep learning models on edge devices in industrial settings. We benchmark multiple distillation strategies across various hardware platforms.

research_papers.title: Attention-Enhanced TCN for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
research_papers.abstract: We propose an attention-enhanced temporal convolutional network that captures both local and global dependencies in multivariate time series data. Evaluated on multiple forecasting benchmarks including industrial applications.

research_papers.title: Federated Learning for Predictive Maintenance Across Distributed Industrial Systems
research_papers.abstract: A federated learning framework for predictive maintenance that enables collaborative model training across distributed industrial systems without sharing raw sensor data.

research_papers.title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Engine Health Monitoring and RUL Estimation
research_papers.abstract: Combining physics-based degradation models with neural networks for more interpretable and accurate remaining useful life estimation of aircraft engines. Validated on C-MAPSS FD001-FD004.

ai_frontier.title: Reasoning Beyond Chains: Tree-of-Thought Planning in Large Language Models
ai_frontier.abstract: We present a novel tree-of-thought planning mechanism that significantly improves complex reasoning in LLMs. Our method enables systematic exploration of reasoning paths with automatic backtracking.

ai_frontier.title: Video Generation at Scale: A 10B Parameter Diffusion Transformer
ai_frontier.abstract: We scale video generation to 10 billion parameters using a diffusion transformer architecture, achieving unprecedented temporal consistency and visual quality across minutes-long generations.

ai_frontier.title: Self-Play Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Agent Coordination
ai_frontier.abstract: A new self-play RL framework that enables emergent coordination behaviors in multi-agent systems, demonstrated in complex strategy games and robotic coordination tasks.

ai_frontier.title: Efficient Fine-Tuning of Foundation Models with Sparse Mixture of Experts
ai_frontier.abstract: We propose a sparse mixture-of-experts approach for efficient fine-tuning of large foundation models, reducing compute requirements by 8x while maintaining performance across diverse benchmarks.

ai_frontier.title: Multimodal Agents: Integrating Vision, Language, and Action in Embodied AI
ai_frontier.abstract: A unified framework for building embodied AI agents that seamlessly integrate visual perception, language understanding, and physical action in real-world environments.

ai_frontier.title: AlphaScience: Using AI to Accelerate Scientific Discovery
ai_frontier.abstract: DeepMind announces AlphaScience, a new system that uses AI to accelerate scientific discovery across chemistry, biology, and materials science.

ai_frontier.title: Constitutional AI 2.0: Learning from Human Feedback at Scale
ai_frontier.abstract: An improved constitutional AI training methodology that scales RLHF to larger model families while maintaining alignment properties and reducing reward hacking.

ai_frontier.title: The 2026 AI Index Report: Key Findings on Global AI Development
ai_frontier.abstract: Stanford HAI releases its annual AI Index report tracking progress in AI development, deployment, regulation, and societal impact worldwide.
